summary:
To measure surface roughness, use a profilometer as it is specialized equipment designed for evaluating textures and surfaces accurately. Agent2 reasoned that out of all available tools or methods listed, a profilometer was most suitable due to its specific design for such tasks related to surface measurement. This aligns with standard practices used clinically when precise assessments are required regarding material properties like those found in implants.
